content_body: We absolutely loved our time here, the view is amazing! We ate on the deck every meal, made a fire at night, morning coffee and yoga on the deck, and really enjoyed the open living to the amazing view. We hiked, went fishing at Cartecay, rented a pontoon boat at Lake Blue Ridge Marina for the day. It was a lovely trip and my kids would like to move here, so thanks for that!!! We will be back!
title: We Will Return!
